meta.description: Scheduled daily energy-sector intelligence product (default 06:30) focused on the UAE/ADNOC ecosystem. Loads energy sources, analyses with the provider-abstracted AI (prompts/analyst.md), auto-builds a premium cover image via the Image Provider Abstraction from the top stories, renders HTML/PDF/email using the shared branded base template, stores outputs + an archive copy, and emails it. Every external step has a failure path (Error Handling, Fail-safe defaults).

nodes.name: Enabled?
nodes.notes: Fail-safe toggle: ENERGY_BRIEF_ENABLED=false disables the product without deleting it.

nodes.name: Fetch Energy Sources
nodes.notes: Failure path: an unreachable source is skipped, not fatal.

nodes.name: AI Analyst (provider-abstracted)
nodes.notes: Ollama by default; AI_PROVIDER switches the endpoint with no workflow change.

nodes.name: Generate Cover (Image Provider)
nodes.notes: Image Provider Abstraction: IMAGE_PROVIDER selects the descriptor. Failure path -> brief is rendered without a cover. Uses env var names only; no key committed.

nodes.name: Archive Copy
nodes.notes: Historical archive used for trend analysis.

nodes.name: Reduced Coverage Notice
nodes.notes: Failure path: emit a reduced-coverage brief + log instead of producing nothing.
